news.t: Bank Indonesia Raises Rates Again to Defend Rupiah
Asian Currencies Consolidate Before Decision by Warsh-Led FOMC
Bank Indonesia Surprises With Rate Hike to Stem Rupiah Bleeding
Bank Indonesia Delivers First Rate Hike in Years as Rupiah Flounders, Risks Rise
Foreign firms eye Hong Kong listings as IPO rebound broadens
Indonesia wants to reforest 12 million hectares of degraded land, may sell carbon offsets, minister says
Indonesian markets resume selloff after Moody's cuts outlook
Indonesia stock exchange CEO resigns after $80 billion market rout
White House releases U.S.-Indonesia trade deal framework, final talks underway
The Trump administration announced details on its trade framework with Indonesia, although key specifics about how the U.S. will apply tariffs to goods from that nation remain unclear

holdings.infoBox: EIDO is an equity ETF with a total of 73 individual holdings.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Indonesia ETF (EIDO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Indonesia IMI 25-50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of large-, mid and small-cap Indonesian companies. EIDO was launched on May 5, 2010 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Bank Indonesia Raises Rates Again to Defend Rupiah
data.text: Indonesia's central bank raised interest rates again Thursday as it seeks to support the rupiah and contain inflation risks stemming from geopolitical volatility.

data.title: Asian Currencies Consolidate Before Decision by Warsh-Led FOMC
data.text: Asian currencies consolidated against the dollar before first decision by a FOMC led by Chairman Kevin Warsh later.

data.title: Bank Indonesia Surprises With Rate Hike to Stem Rupiah Bleeding
data.text: Indonesia's central bank hiked rates in an off-schedule decision on Tuesday, coming as a complex mix of headwinds hammer the country's currency.

data.title: Bank Indonesia Delivers First Rate Hike in Years as Rupiah Flounders, Risks Rise
data.text: Indonesia's central bank snapped a long-running pause as it delivered its first rate hike in over two years.

data.title: President Trump announces 19% tariff on imports from Indonesia
data.text: CNBC's Megan Cassella reports on President Donald Trump's announcement of a preliminary trade deal with Indonesia that will set a 19% tariff on the southeast Asian country's U.S. exports.
